reviews.review_msg: Odd experience. His policy: Miss 2+ classes? You get an NA. No laptops in class. If using Zoom, camera on, or he'll call you out until you turn it on, or he kicks you. He answers questions during class in a way that makes you feel like you should know better. However, talking to him 1-on-1 he is keen to help and seems to genuinely care about you.

One of the most IRRESPONSIBLE instructors I've ever had. Slides and homework are taken from others. Doesn't prepare for lectures at all. At times he just stares at the slides in silence like he has no idea what is on it. Still, he requires attendance. 1/3 of the term was taught by his grad students. Often late to lectures or end early.
